creator: mhxdev@gmail.com
text:
I install the 8.2 release version on my acer 4740 laptop,but after i install normally i cannt boot my computer.
and cannt get through the bios check.
So i have to  change a new harddisk from the Customer Service.
It works well with linux amd64 distrobution and windows 7 X86_64.
I suppose it may be a serious problem!
